markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Troubleshoot and resolve GrowthX login issues for accessing Firework's blog publishing interface.](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Access issue resolved: GrowthX now has full publishing rights via Firework's content management interface](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [New workflow: GrowthX to use Firework's CMS directly for blog publishing, bypassing previous access limitations](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [Potential display issue: Published blogs may not immediately appear on the main website's archive page (to be monitored)](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Access audit needed: Firework to review and optimize user access levels due to limited high-level access seats (5 total)](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)

## Topics

### Access Resolution

  - [Previous email-based workflow replaced with direct CMS access](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX now has unrestricted access to Firework's content management system](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Blog posts section is the primary relevant area for GrowthX within the CMS](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
  - [New interface deemed more user-friendly by Firework representative](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)

### New Publishing Process

  - [GrowthX successfully published a test blog post during the call](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Minimal requirements for publishing: title and category](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Recent addition of "locales" feature, but not necessary for immediate use](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Cameron (Firework) offered to delete the test post after the call](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)

### Content Backlog

  - [GrowthX has multiple blog posts queued for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Team aims to publish all pending articles within 24-48 hours](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)

### Display Issues

  - [Test post published successfully but didn't appear on the main website's blog archive](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Direct link to the published post works correctly](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Potential causes: missing thumbnail or other metadata](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Cameron to investigate if the issue persists with properly formatted posts](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)

### Access Management

  - [Firework has limited high-level access seats (5 total)](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Cameron plans to audit current access levels and optimize user permissions](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [GrowthX's access deemed necessary and will be maintained](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to publish backlogged blog posts using the new CMS interface](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Monitor for any issues with published posts appearing on the blog archive page](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Report any persistent display issues to Cameron for further investigation](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Cameron to conduct an audit of user access levels and optimize permissions](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up if any new issues arise during the publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/ooct9bgUgBxdmAmYzK3777x7VHp3nMr2?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
